rationale: In the citing paper, the 2019 mobile-versus-nonmobile review study appears only as a background reference in the bibliography and is not given a clear functional role in the argument. The core theory, hypotheses, and studies are built around graphical rating-distribution formats (simple vs proportional bar graphs), with no explicit use of the cited paper's mechanism, measures, or empirical setup. Because the citing text does not show how this specific prior work informs framing beyond general literature coverage, the citation is best treated as a passing mention.
